steps.title: Find the original median
steps.content: The original data set has $7$ values, so the median is the $4$th value. In $7,7,9,9,9,12,23$, that value is $9$.

steps.title: Check the even list
steps.content: Each choice has $6$ values, so use the average of the $3$rd and $4$th values. The list $7,7,9,9,12,12$ has median $9$. The answer is B.
